sourcesContent:
import React from 'react'; const SubmissionModal = ({ submission, onClose }) => { if (!submission) return null; const getModuleStatus = (complete) => { return complete === 'Y' ? '✓ Complete' : '○ Incomplete'; }; const getModuleClass = (complete) => { return complete === 'Y' ? 'module-complete' : 'module-incomplete'; }; return (
e.stopPropagation()}> {/* Header */}

{submission.Product}

{submission.Protocol_ID} · {submission.Country}

{/* Content Grid */}
{/* Submission Info */}

Submission Information

Protocol ID: {submission.Protocol_ID}
Product: {submission.Product}
Product Type: {submission.Product_Type}
Therapeutic Area: {submission.Sector}
Country: {submission.Country}
Region: {submission.Global_Region}
Regulatory Agency: {submission.Regulatory_Agency}
Submission Date: {submission.Submission_Date}
{/* Status & Timeline */}

Review Status

Current Status: {submission.Submission_Status}
Days in Review: {submission.Days_In_Review} days
Schedule Variance: 0 ? 'text-red' : 'text-green'}`}> {submission.Schedule_Variance_Days > 0 ? '+' : ''}{submission.Schedule_Variance_Days} days
Risk Score: {submission.Risk_Score}/10
{/* Financial Impact */}

Financial Impact

Peak Sales Potential: ${submission.peak_sales_millions.toFixed(1)}M
Daily Revenue Rate: ${(submission.peak_sales_millions / 365).toFixed(0)}K/day
{/* CRL Status */}

CRL Status

CRL Received: {submission.CRL_Received === 'Yes' ? 'Yes' : 'No'}
{submission.CRL_Category && (
CRL Category: {submission.CRL_Category}
)}
GMP Site Status: {submission.GMP_Site_Status}
{/* eCTD Module Completeness */}

eCTD Module Completeness

1
Administrative
{getModuleStatus(submission.Module_1_Complete)}
2
Summaries
{getModuleStatus(submission.Module_2_Complete)}
3
Quality (CMC)
{getModuleStatus(submission.Module_3_Complete)}
4
Nonclinical
{getModuleStatus(submission.Module_4_Complete)}
5
Clinical
{getModuleStatus(submission.Module_5_Complete)}
{submission.Open_Deficiencies > 0 && (
⚠ {submission.Open_Deficiencies} open deficiencies
)}
{/* Footer Actions */}
); }; export default SubmissionModal;
